mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_user_role_relation (user_id, role_id, is_primary, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.roleId}, #{item.isPrimary}, #{item.createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user_role_relation SET is_primary = CASE WHEN role_id = #{roleId} THEN '1' ELSE '0' END WHERE user_id = #{userId}
